headline: These Tech CEOs Campaign to Stop Donald Trump From Sending Troops to San Francisco
summary: President Trump has retracted his decision to initiate a law-enforcement "surge" in San Francisco.

headline: Apple Inc. To Boost iPad Pro Performance With Vapor Chamber Integration
summary: In a bid to enhance the performance of its iPad Pro, Apple is reportedly planning to incorporate a vapor chamber into the device.

headline: Trump's White House Ballroom Donors Include Google, Micron, Palantir and More
summary: The $300 million cost of Trump's ballroom is being covered entirely by private donors, including several major corporations.

headline: Trump's Gold-For-Bitcoin Shock Plan Targets $38 Trillion Debt and $242K BTC
summary: Sen. Cynthia Lummis (R-Wyo.) says that the Trump administration is considering a radical plan to convert a portion of the nation's gold reserves into Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC)  to build a strategic digital reserve.

headline: Microsoft's AI Chief Criticizes ChatGPT's Erotica Features Despite $13 Billion OpenAI Investment
summary: Microsoft will not develop "simulated erotica" for its chatbot users. AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman warned that such capabilities could pose significant risks.

headline: Benzinga's 'Stock Whisper' Index: 5 Stocks Investors Secretly Monitor But Don't Talk About Yet
summary: Each week, Benzinga's Stock Whisper Index uses a combination of proprietary data and pattern recognition to showcase five stocks that are just under the surface and deserve attention.

headline: iPod Inventor Tony Fadell Worked Alongside Steve Jobs and Larry Page: The Two Couldn't Have Been More Different
summary: Former Nest CEO Tony Fadell holds a rare vantage point in Silicon Valley, having worked closely with Steve Jobs and, later, Alphabet cofounder Larry Page and says he learned different lessons from each.

headline: Consumer Tech News (Oct 20-Oct 24): Elon Musk Warns Against NASA-DOT Move, Apple Faces Antitrust Heat And More
summary: Elon Musk criticizes plan to fold NASA into Department of Transportation, claims it threatens agency's independence and US space leadership.

headline: Jeff Bezos Isn't a Fan of Compromise as a Way of Overcoming Disagreements — Here Is What the Amazon Founder Does Instead
summary: Jeff Bezos revealed on the Lex Fridman Podcast that Amazon's "disagree and commit" approach lets leaders quickly make decisions, prioritize speed and trust, and avoid unproductive debates, even when the CEO personally disagrees.

headline: Weekend Round-Up: Ford's EV Forecast, Tesla's Robotaxi Threat, Quantumscape's Solid-State Vision And More…
summary: From Ford Motor Co. CEO's prediction of a slowdown in EV adoption to Tesla Inc. posing a significant threat to Uber with its robotaxi, the tech and auto industry was abuzz with news this week.

headline: Weekend Tech Round-Up: Disney-Google Dispute, Major AWS Outage, Meta's AI Shake-Up And More…
summary: From a potential blackout of Disney-owned networks on YouTube TV to the impressive sales of Apple's iPhone 17 in China, there was no shortage of news in the tech world this week.

summary: From Apple's legal battles and iPhone struggles to Warner Bros. Discovery's takeover talks, here are the biggest Apple stories from the week.

headline: Retail Trader Who Sparked Beyond Meat Rally Plays Down Comparisons With 'Roaring Kitty,' Says BYND Surge Is Different: Report
summary: Dimitri Semenikhin downplays comparisons to Roaring Kitty as he sparked the rally in Beyond Meat stock, stating the dynamics are different.

headline: Gary Shilling Warns Gen Z: 'Young People Are Going To Have To Work A Lot Harder Than They Might Think To Succeed' In AI Era
summary: Economist Gary Shilling warns of AI's impact on jobs & wealth. Hustle, adaptability, & AI skills are key for success, experts say.
